purpose: Store the source-of-truth data that drives the generated root CHECKLIST.md document.

files.role: Main checklist document in structured JSON form, split into active_items and archived_items.
Append-only event log for recent completions and meaningful checklist changes.
Machine-friendly schema reference for checklist data.

maintenance_rules: Add new checklist items to items.json.active_items.
Do not change an item's id once it has been established.
Update unfinished items by editing active_items fields such as status, priority, summary, and acceptance.
When a task is completed, move it from active_items to archived_items and append a new line to events.jsonl.
After changing source data, rerun python scripts/render_checklist.py to regenerate CHECKLIST.md.

field_notes.meaning: Stable identifier used for indexing, comparison, and future migration.
Functional grouping tags. One item may belong to multiple areas.
Curated section exposure such as current position or checkpoint.
Per-section ordering override when an item appears in multiple sections.
Append-only history that preserves completion and migration records outside the active root checklist view.
Explicit split between unfinished work and completed records to reduce scanning cost for both humans and agents.
